scripts.build:github-pages: if [ -z "$BASE_URL" ]; then echo 'BASE_URL is required' >&2; exit 1; fi; sh ./scripts/build_hugo.sh --gc --minify --environment production --baseURL "$BASE_URL" && sh ./scripts/run_pagefind.sh public
scripts.validate:topic-pages: python3 ./scripts/validate_site.py expected-files --site-dir public --paths ai-agent/index.html coding-agent/index.html open-source-ai-tools/index.html
